feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - How to get currectUser for Approved By
entry.content:
I want to capture currentUser so that I can pass the value in Approved By. 

Currently I use "Process Started By" but the value return is system generated and it looked like a secret code instead of currentUser name. 

How can I get currentUser name to pass actual user name in Approved By field?


Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent can't Add Attributes or run Unattended Mode projects
entry.content:
I'm currently trying to run a SAP Business Process, which executes a Task Automation process. The process is relatively straightforward, the Task Automation reads from a CSV, and outputs the variables into a form back in the Business Process. I followed the steps in the Agent Management agent settings tutorial:

- SAP Desktop Agent is installed and connected to tenant. It can run automations in Design Mode.

- The agent is added to the environment under Agent Management. It is shown as idle.

- The project has been deployed, and the agent version set to match the Desktop Agent.

The only thing I was unable to follow was the adding of agent attributes, as the trial version doesn't let me create a new environment or add any agent attributes to the existing environment. When I run the process, the project does not load into the agent, even though it is connected and idle in the environment. In addition, checking the agent's available projects shows nothing. May I know any steps I am missing?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Issue Sending Nested Structures from SAP BPA to a BAPI
entry.content:
We are developing an automation in SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) that consumes a BAPI from our SAP system. In this process, BPA needs to send a nested structure to the BAPI, which includes multiple levels of subcomponents and internal tables.

The issue is that, when configuring the integration, BPA does not allow us to correctly map the deep structure and instead treats the field as a simple string. As a result, the BAPI does not receive the data in a structured format and cannot process it correctly.

 

How can SAP BPA handle nested structures when sending data to a BAPI?

Is there any configuration in BPA that allows it to correctly recognize the subcomponents of a deep structure?

Does SAP recommend serializing the data in JSON/XML for this case, or is there a native way to send complete structures from BPA?

Is it possible to use basXML or any other mechanism in the RFC communication to overcome this limitation?

Is there specific SAP documentation on handling deep structures in BPA?

entry.title: How do i trigger process automation(BPA) through custom ui5 application?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I am searching for "trigger build process automation using Custom ui5 application", i think we have to create destination to trigger it but i don't know the actual process.
please come up with suitable solution.
#BPA #Ui5 #automation #BTP #Fiori #SAP

Best regards
Kushagra Sharma

entry.title: No projects available for my Desktop Agent
entry.content:
Dear community,

Does anyone know how to resolve this issue: "It looks like no project has been received yet.

When there are, you'll see them here." on Desktop Agent?

I got this issue although I already set up enough settings as below:

①Project : deployed to the environment "public"

②Agent : added to the environment "public"

③Desktop Agent : Attended mode

④Connection between Desktop Agent & Tenant : Active

I have no idea about what I should do anymore. I would appreciate it if you gave me some setting that I miss, some advice on this, etc..

Thank you.

Regards,

entry.title: Process Automation Rest Based Action on Identity Directory API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I wanted to create an action in SAP Build Process Automation using the Identity Directory API from SAP Cloud Identity Service

But I am getting this error

Have anyone encountered the same? and how did you solve it?

 

Thank you in Advance! 

Alden

entry.title: How to get the current date time of specific time zone in BPA
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to get the current date time of specific time zone (eg. AU time zone) in the BPA.

I used new Date() and it gets as GMT +0 time zone.

How can I convert to AU time zone?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Best Approach for Scheduled Trigger with User Credentials Input in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on an automation in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA) that connects to SAP S/4HANA using client-specific credentials. Currently, I am using environment variables to store login details, but I would like to improve the process by allowing my client to enter their own credentials before execution.

Additionally, I want this automation to be scheduled to run daily. The challenge is ensuring that the client enters their credentials once, and then the automation continues to run daily using those credentials, while keeping the process secure and user-friendly.

My current setup:

  • The automation connects to SAP S/4HANA using environment variables for credentials.
  • I fill those environment variables when deploying my project
  • I created a trigger to run my automation daily (from the control tower).
  • I want to replace hardcoded credentials with a way for users to input their login details (e.g., via a form).

Questions:

  1. What would be the best approach to allow users to input their credentials securely before execution?
  2. Is there a way to prompt users via a form before the scheduled job runs?
  3. Would creating a process with a form be a good alternative (if so, how would I make it so that it runs daily), or is there another recommended approach?

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SBPA Destination issue sap_process_automation_service_user_access
entry.content:
I am following below tutorial from developer.sap.com and getting destination connectivity issue.

Experience SAP Build By Creating an End-to-End Sales Scenario, failed in Create SAP Build App to Trigger Workflow step.
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html

error: "Failed to build headers.\n The destination tried to provide authorization tokens but failed in all cases. This is most likely due to misconfiguration.\nOriginal error messages: <striped token error>" message: "Unable to fulfill proxy request"

Steps

1. I have completed Create a Sales Order Process Using SAP Build Process Automation Successfully.

2. After that I have created Create a Sales Order App Using SAP Build Apps from SAP Build Successfully.

3. When I try to acccess from Build App Preview getting above destination issue.

Destination 

4. As per turorial it will work like this.

Regards,

Venkata Ramireddy.

entry.title: Error message: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persist
entry.content: I could not subscribe BPA. Please assist

entry.title: Logo in Build Process Automation Approval Form.
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are currently working on the Build Process Automation wherein we have designed a form but unfortunately we are unable to add Logo as we don't see any option to add one. 

Can someone help us with this?

Thanks,
Gaurav

entry.title: Call Action Project error queryA ENOTFOUND in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Destination configuration 

we configured the S4HANA On-premise URL as a Destination like in a below screenshot.

Action Project

Process Automation Flow

We added the above Action project as a Dependency to our process automation flow like in a below screenshot.

Problem we are facing

Below is the response of the action activity 'GET_MAIL_LIST'.

I saw the similar issue in the below community link : Call web service error queryA ENOTFOUND - SAP Community However it didn't help us to resolve the issue.

Kindly help me to figure out the issue.

SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Build Process Automation 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Sakthi.

entry.title: BPA SAP Desktop Agent v3.39.45. The job has been refused error.
entry.content:
Since the v3.39.45 update SAP Desktop Agent, I'm getting this error in Desktop agent.

The Job has been refused

This is happening for all my BPA projects, when launching a process or running the automation directly in design mode. Even a very simple one-step test project with a single dialog causes the error now.

So far tried the following:

  • Downgraded both the projects and Desktop Agent to the previous, working version. (3.38.59).
  • Removing and re-registering the agent in SAP Build
  • Uninstalling and re-installing Desktop Agent from scratch.

SAP Build Process Automation 

Any suggestions because at the moment we cannot run an BPA projects.

entry.title: Build Process Automation API Trigger, Can't Get Definition ID
entry.content:
I've created a SAP Build Process Automation Process (i.e. a Workflow), with a Trigger of type 'API Call'.  I need to figure out how to call it.  I can't find SAP tutorials about exactly this, but I've pieced together some stuff from various blogs etc. including some 'official SAP blogs'.  They all have a crucial step to find the Definition ID in the 'Monitor->Manage' section (the UIs in the blogs might look slightly different than my UI, but I believe that's due to version differences).  All the blogs show the Definition ID being in a section 'Processes and Workflows' (screenshot below from one of these blogs).  However, when I go to 'Monitoring' (in my version of BPA, this shows sections and tiles, screenshot below), under the 'Manage' section I don't have a 'Processes And Workflows' tile.

If I'm going to the wrong place, I'd appreciate that info.  If the reason the tile isn't showing up is because I missed some step or some role or permission assignment or something like that, I'd appreciate that info.  Really any help at all would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: How to create an event in SAP Build Automation to call Rest IFLOW in Cloud Integration
entry.content: Hello!   We have a project that is being created in SAP Build Automation that will read an email, transform the attachment, and make a REST call to a SAP Cloud Integration IFLOW with a .json body. The Destination seems to be working as we can pull in the list of IFLOW's available.  But we're struggling on how to put the remaining pieces together to complete the process flow.   All of the blogs that I've found to date appear to be from earlier versions as their links are no longer found.

entry.title: Not able to get the workflow instance tasks in my BPA Inbox
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have come across the requirement that, we need to design approval processes that will get triggered from your ABAP env(RAP application). Based on the details, the approver will approve or reject the form.

Above is the basic travel application, the user will create the travel and send it for the approval process. As instance gets created the status for the travel is set to W(Waiting), and the approval form gets triggered.
I'm able to see the task instance in the monitor tab in the BAP but not able to see the task in the inbox of my BPA.

Monitor(Has the triggered task)

Inbox: blank

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Error importing project from another BTP sub-account.
entry.content:
I'm trying to export a project from the SAP Build Lobby of one BTP sub-account and imported into another.

I've exported / imported the required destinations and actions fine, and deployed the actions, but on importing the BPA project, I get the following error. 

Import failed.

You cannot import this external package because editable version(s) of dependencies already exists.

Correlation Id: b2a8e590-dab8-42eb-6e65-a4a2e8c41c33

Any idea what is causing this issue, or even how to track down more details on the error?

entry.title: SAP Buld Process Automation. Error: "Subscription Failed . "
entry.content:
I have a trial plan.

Subaccount: Azure/Singapor

CF is created.

Subscription Failed 

Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: Can SAP BPA identify and input the values for the elements present in the SharePoint Portal?
entry.content:
We are facing a n issue in entering the values for the fields in SharePoint Portal. Is there any package or libraries that needs to be added for this operation?

SAP BPA is able to identify the fields but not able to enter the values and also not throwing any error.

Please suggest.

entry.title: SAP GUI option is not showing in the Technology drop-down in SAP Build Process Automation for S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello experts, I would like to need support on the query below:

I am exploring the recorder function in the SAP Build Process Automation, and all the pre-requisities have been completed.

  • Access to a SAP BTP tenant with SAP Build Process Automation
  • Install and set up the Desktop Agent 3 to run the automation
  • Scripting enabled for SAP GUI for Windows on the Client and the Server
  • Only use 32-bit SAP GUI for Windows Application
  • SAP GUI for Windows must run in the background

The issue that I have noticed is that SAP GUI Technology is not showing in the dropdown menu if you are using the S4HANA version.

The below screenshot was taken for SAP ECC, and here SAP GUI is showing in the Technology dropdown. And the business process recording works perfrectly fine.

 

The below screenshot was taken for the SAP S/4HANA 2023 version. You can see no SAP GUI option is showing in the Technology dropdown in the SAP Build Process Automation Recorder option/feature.

 

Furthermore, if you press the record button and start the recording, then the recorder throws an error message that "The screen could not be captured. Please relaunch the recorder."

Below is the RZ11 screenshot:

Could you guys please provide the valuable and appropriate solution to resolve the issue. Your response would be much appreciated.

Regards,

Mubasher
